subcodes.first_line: Unto Thee be praise, O my God, for having guided Thy companions to the Most Great Ocean in Thy grace and generosity, and for having given them to drink therefrom
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما هدیت اولیائک الی البحر الاعظم بجودک و فضلک و سقیتهم منه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the power of words; of speech
